3. Property Surveys:
   • For a modern "New Build" condo with integrated smart features, a Basic Survey (CAD $300) may often be sufficient if the building has been recently constructed. However, some buyers choose the Full Structural Survey (CAD $650) for a more in-depth look at potential long-term issues even in a new build. In this particular case, since the design is cutting-edge, a more detailed inspection might provide additional peace of mind.
